## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory meeting between Marcel Santilli and AJ Ghergich to explore potential collaboration and discuss their professional backgrounds.](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AJ has extensive experience in SEO, content marketing, and agency leadership, with a current focus on technical SEO at Botify](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Marcel recently raised $12M for his AI-powered content and SEO startup, experiencing rapid growth with $6M ARR in 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Both have complementary skills and interests in AI-driven content creation and SEO at scale](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [There's mutual interest in exploring a potential leadership role for AJ within Marcel's company](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)

## Topics

### AJ's Professional Background

  - [Serial entrepreneur with focus on SEO and content marketing since early 2000s](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
  - [Previously owned an agency doing high-end content for enterprise clients (e.g., Salesforce)](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Joined a health and life science agency roll-up, stayed for 4 years](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Currently at Botify, leading a team of 12 focused on enterprise-level technical SEO](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

### Marcel's Startup Journey

  - [Built successful content engines at various companies (HubSpot, DeepGram)](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Started with AI-powered content workshops, evolved into a full-service offering](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Raised $12M in funding on favorable terms](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [Rapid growth: $6M ARR in less than 6 months, 62 deals in pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [Average deal size of $150,000/year, most closing within 30 days](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)

### AI-Powered Content Creation

  - [Marcel's company has developed a runtime layer for executing complex content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Uses coding agents and AI to build and iterate on content creation processes](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
  - [Focuses on outcomes and scalability, going beyond traditional content and SEO approaches](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)

### Market Demand and Growth

  - [Experiencing high demand with 20 inbound demo requests per week](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Demos booked through March without active marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [Seeking to scale operations and delivery capabilities to meet demand](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)

### Potential Collaboration

  - [Marcel interested in bringing AJ on board in a leadership capacity](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1876.0)
  - [Discussed possibility of a C-suite level position with significant responsibility and equity](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in continuing the conversation](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to reach out and schedule a follow-up hour-long meeting early next week](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1953.0)
  - [Discuss potential role architecture and compensation package in more detail](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
  - [Explore AJ's thoughts on maintaining content quality and addressing potential AI-related challenges](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [Further examine the technology stack and operational processes of Marcel's company](https://fathom.video/share/vffQ1idMMkgWyS8cB7-yfq8zyxb73g94?tab=summary&timestamp=1965.0)
